horoscope: There can be new interests or a reawakening of interests today, dear Aries. Pleasing, freeing energy is available to you. Helping others can be one way to discover it, as you can feel especially good about responding to others’ needs and wants and doing what you can to support them. Your sense of freedom gets a boost through fewer inhibitions. Also today, the Sun enters Leo, moving into harmony with your sign, and will spend the coming month in your sector of joy, creativity, and romance. This Sun transit awakens your feelings and desire to share. It’s a time for expressing your talents, abilities, and affections. You’re moved to create, put your talents and skills to use, show others what you can do, enjoy romance, or partake of many of life’s pleasures. You might pay more attention to personal hobbies, recreation, and entertainment in the weeks ahead.

You are bound to come up with innovative ideas today that can be put into practice later, dear Taurus. Improvements and opportunities are likely in your practical affairs, including money and career. You’re finding ways to satisfy your need for variety while still feeling emotionally safe. The Sun begins its month-long transit of your home and family sector today, turning your attention to your inner world. You’re seeking more quiet, downtime, comfort, and familiarity in the weeks ahead. You’re taking more pride in your home or family, making it a great time to focus on improvements. The Sun is now encouraging you to tend to the hearth and heart. It’s a good cycle for boosting your sense of safety, security, and comfort. The needs of family and the home environment may not necessarily increase, but you’ll hear them loud and clear.

You’re inclined to talk things through with others today, dear Gemini. It can be a good time to release some stress or share a problem with someone. With your ruler, Mercury, about to end its retrograde, there can be some misunderstandings for a couple of days, but things are looking up. The Sun begins its month-long transit of your communications sector today, and in the coming weeks, curiosity motivates you to connect and learn more than usual. It’s a great time to put your feelers out. It’s an excellent time to pick up new skills, learn about the people around you, and take care of everyday affairs. You’re likely to communicate with people more frequently during this busy, engaged period. It’s a time of increased awareness of what needs to be repaired, healed, and improved in your immediate environment, communications, and interactions.

Cooperation comes easily today, and your ideas are well-received, dear Cancer. Getting past a problem area can be in focus, and it's refreshing. Also today, the Sun finishes its yearly, month-long transit of your sign, and begins its transit of your resources sector. Until August 22nd, you’re seeking a little more security and predictability than usual. It’s a favorable time to take stock, secure your valuables, and gain a better sense of what you can accomplish. Your view of your capabilities is realistic during this stabilizing cycle. You benefit most from grounding activities and from making the most of your natural talents and abilities. You could be motivated to take extra care of your things and take charge of your finances. It’s a good cycle in which to discover what it is you truly value.

You could find that a significant other in your life backs your goals, dear Leo, and this can be encouraging today. Your long-term vision helps enhance or attract a relationship. You’re letting go of preconceived or outdated ideas of friendships and relationships, and it feels good to move forward. Your ruler, the Sun, enters your sign today and will transit there for the coming month. You’re in your element with this transit that lasts until August 22nd! You’ve come to the end of a reflective cycle with the Sun finishing up in your privacy sector. It’s a time to shine, reinvent yourself, or come into the light in a significant manner. You feel more in charge, relevant, and on top of things during this period. Others notice you, even more than usual. Ideally, you’ve had more time to process or digest recent events, and you bring a more rested “you” into a new cycle that puts you at the forefront. You’re likely to want to start fresh.

Practical matters, business, and recognition for hard work and skills can be in the foreground today, dear Virgo, and thinking outside the box works to your advantage. Opportunities for improved working conditions and advancement can emerge. Discovering new ways to handle the practical side of life feels freeing. Also today, the Sun moves into your solar twelfth house for a month-long transit. This new solar cycle can increase the need for rest, privacy, or a break from competitive energies. You require more substantial chunks of time to yourself or devoted to reflection on the activities and developments of the last year. It’s the final month of the solar cycle, a time to wrap things up. Extra rest will help balance things out, so aim to use this time well to avoid overload. You are gathering your strength for busier times to come. It’s a good time to shed attitudes and situations that have run their natural course.

Connecting with others romantically or creatively comes a little more easily today, dear Libra, and your openness to share can open up opportunities for you. With Mercury ending its retrograde tomorrow, there can be some misunderstandings for a couple of days, but things are turning around. The Sun begins its month-long transit of your sector of community and friendships today, bringing new energy into your life that pulls your attention to happiness goals and networking. Your need for others, or for spending time with people and on projects that help you de-stress, emerges. This cycle turns your attention to social activities, networks, friendships, dreams, and ideals. You’re increasingly interested in what makes you happy and how you fit in with others or contribute. Your mood is more hopeful and positive. Sharing ideals or visions with others gives you a boost, and you get more satisfaction than usual when your actions positively impact others.

There can be a freeing feeling today regarding your personal life, dear Scorpio. You could feel a strong desire to make peace with someone, and personal and social needs blend well. Family and intimate relationships can improve with new ways to interact. Also today, the Sun begins its month-long transit of your sector of career and reputation, putting your ambitions on the front burner for the coming weeks. It’s a strong period for taking charge of your life, taking the lead, and focusing on your long-term goals. You are more noticeable and accountable than usual during this cycle. Assuming more responsibilities could be part of this, or it could be a time to tap into your ambitions or adopt a goal-oriented approach. You may very well come to a high point of the year in your career or reputation. People in positions of power are more likely to notice you and listen to you. Improving your life and rising to challenges can be satisfying now.

Allowing and exercising more freedom in your relationships comes more naturally today, dear Sagittarius, with greater openness to updating interaction styles or different ways to get things done. You're taking a break from the humdrum, and it becomes you! Also today, the Sun begins its month-long transit of your spirit sector, bringing you out of yourself and into the light. You might search for greater meaning and richer experiences in the weeks ahead. Things that expand your understanding of the world around you appeal more than usual now. You’re in good shape for lifting yourself above the usual routines, even in little ways, so that you can round out your experiences. You are curious, and you might do more studying, exploring, and learning during this cycle that lasts until August 22nd.

The day’s transits incline you to focus on the more positive elements of your life, dear Capricorn. There could be good support or good news at the level of health and wellness. Unexpected bonuses might be part of the picture now. Also today, the Sun begins its transit of your intimacy sector. It will spend the coming month there, stirring your desire to connect with your more profound emotions. This Sun cycle also awakens your interest in meaningful and absorbing relationships or projects. The coming weeks are strong for introspection and developing your intimate or inner world. You tend to pick a focus and pour a lot of energy into it. It can be a time for facing your fears! Self-honesty comes in especially handy during this Sun transit. Changes, both inner and outer, tend to occur now that remind you that you’re growing. There may be a strong focus on others’ money, such as the resources of a partner.

You may take advantage of situations that allow you to express your inner child today, dear Aquarius. There can be moments of friendly competition or finding support and nurturing in unexpected places. Today’s transits support design or creative work, or expressing your more romantic and thoughtful side. A release from pressure or worry can figure strongly now. Also today, the Sun moves into your opposite sign for a month-long stay, pointing to a more sociable phase of the year. It’s a good time to recognize the need for a different perspective on your life and boost key relationships. A project may bloom now, and you’re turning a corner, looking for new interests or things to do. Your broader focus turns to partnerships, negotiations, and self-expression through your relationships. It’s an excellent time to examine your expectations of others. You can be more sensitive to imbalances in your life, and you may be seeking more harmony in the weeks ahead.

There is good energy for personal and family matters today, dear Pisces. Perhaps a new freedom is afforded you now that feels great. You feel more capable of moving forward and overcoming obstacles today. Freeing yourself from limiting expectations or restrictions can figure strongly now. As you improve your domestic life, you feel more confident all around. You are putting your faith in your powers of reasoning, and others are responding well. Also today, the Sun begins its month-long transit of your solar sixth house, turning your attention to practical matters, including your work, routines, and health. You take special pride in your tasks, health, and wellness, and it's a good time to take charge of daily routines. You can be especially busy getting your life into better order now. Focusing on self-improvement through self-care programs can be especially useful at this time of the year.
